description: Validation matrix F6 · Two-sided marketplace, pre-revenue soft launch. Expected: pre_scale MC, cmo.brand active early, build+activation emphasis.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Two-sided marketplace connecting independent fitness instructors with local venues. Soft-launched last month in one city, no transactions yet. Business idea validated but no paying customers. Free during beta.

pillar_4.lead_source_other: founder network plus direct outreach to gym owners; largely warm introductions from prior jobs in the fitness industry
